title: Junior Investment Banker at Bajaj Allianz General Global Group

jsonLd.title: Junior Investment Banker at Bajaj Allianz General Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bajaj Allianz General Global Group! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Kanpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bajaj Allianz General Global Group:
Bajaj Allianz General Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Allianz General Global Group!
